languages.text: {n}В последний момент вы уклоняетесь, и нож Иждрига распарывает лишь вашу одежду, вынуждая уклоняться еще сильнее. Вы невольно вкладываете больше силы в свою следующую атаку, стараясь дотянуться до противника.{/n}

{n}At the last moment, you dodge and Batoshski's knife only tears through your clothes, forcing you back even further. Instinctively, you pour more strength into your next attack, as you strain to reach your opponent.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}В последний момент вы уклоняетесь, и нож Иждрига распарывает лишь вашу одежду, вынуждая уклоняться еще сильнее. Вы невольно вкладываете больше силы в свою следующую атаку, стараясь дотянуться до противника.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}At the last moment, you dodge, and Batoshski's knife tears through your clothes, forcing you to evade even further. Involuntarily, you pour more strength into your next attack, straining to reach your opponent.{/n}

{n}At the last moment, you dodge and Batoshski's knife only tears through your clothes, forcing you back even further. Instinctively, you pour more strength into your next attack, as you strain to reach your opponent.{/n}
{n}At the last moment, you dodge, and Batoshski's knife tears through your clothes. A few more rapid exchanges of strikes, and your knives fly off to the side.{/n}

{n}At the last moment, you dodge, and Batoshski's knife tears through your clothes, forcing you to evade even further. Involuntarily, you pour more strength into your next attack, straining to reach your opponent.{/n}

{n}At the last moment, you dodge and Batoshski's knife only tears through your clothes, forcing you back even further. Instinctively, you pour more strength into your next attack, as you strain to reach your opponent.{/n}

{n}At the last moment, you dodge and Batoshski's knife only tears through your clothes, forcing you back even further. Instinctively, you pour more strength into your next attack, as you strain to reach your opponent.{/n}

languages.text: {n}間一髪で身をかわし、バトシュスキーのナイフがあなたの衣服を裂く。さらに素早い応酬を数合交わし、あなたのナイフは横へと弾き飛ばされる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}At the last moment, you dodge, and Batoshski's knife tears through your clothes. A few more rapid exchanges of strikes, and your knives fly off to the side.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}間一髪で身をかわし、バトシュスキーのナイフがあなたの衣服を裂く。さらに素早い応酬を数合交わし、あなたのナイフは横へと弾き飛ばされる。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous esquivez au dernier moment et le couteau de Batoshski déchire vos vêtements, vous obligeant d'autant plus à reculer. Pour compenser, vous étendez tout votre corps en direction de votre adversaire, dans l'espoir de lui asséner une puissante estocade.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}At the last moment, you dodge and Batoshski's knife only tears through your clothes, forcing you back even further. Instinctively, you pour more strength into your next attack, as you strain to reach your opponent.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous esquivez au dernier moment et le couteau de Batoshski déchire vos vêtements, vous obligeant d'autant plus à reculer. Pour compenser, vous étendez tout votre corps en direction de votre adversaire, dans l'espoir de lui asséner une puissante estocade.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Son anda yana kaçıyorsun ve Batoshski'nin bıçağı, sadece kıyafetlerini yırtarak seni daha da gerilemeye zorluyor. İçgüdüsel olarak bir sonraki saldırına daha fazla güç katıyorsun, rakibine ulaşmak için kendini zorluyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}At the last moment, you dodge and Batoshski's knife only tears through your clothes, forcing you back even further. Instinctively, you pour more strength into your next attack, as you strain to reach your opponent.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Son anda yana kaçıyorsun ve Batoshski'nin bıçağı, sadece kıyafetlerini yırtarak seni daha da gerilemeye zorluyor. İçgüdüsel olarak bir sonraki saldırına daha fazla güç katıyorsun, rakibine ulaşmak için kendini zorluyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du weichst im letzten Moment aus und Batoshski Messer durchschneidet lediglich deine Kleidung, treibt dich aber noch weiter zurück. Du legst instinktiv noch mehr Kraft in deinen nächsten Angriff, als du versuchst, deinen Gegner zu erreichen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}At the last moment, you dodge and Batoshski's knife only tears through your clothes, forcing you back even further. Instinctively, you pour more strength into your next attack, as you strain to reach your opponent.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du weichst im letzten Moment aus und Batoshski Messer durchschneidet lediglich deine Kleidung, treibt dich aber noch weiter zurück. Du legst instinktiv noch mehr Kraft in deinen nächsten Angriff, als du versuchst, deinen Gegner zu erreichen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}En el último momento, esquivas y el cuchillo de Batoshski solo corta tu ropa, lo que te obliga a retroceder aún más. Por instinto, imprimes más fuerza a tu próximo ataque mientras te estiras para alcanzar a tu oponente.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}At the last moment, you dodge and Batoshski's knife only tears through your clothes, forcing you back even further. Instinctively, you pour more strength into your next attack, as you strain to reach your opponent.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}En el último momento, esquivas y el cuchillo de Batoshski solo corta tu ropa, lo que te obliga a retroceder aún más. Por instinto, imprimes más fuerza a tu próximo ataque mientras te estiras para alcanzar a tu oponente.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你在最后一刻闪开，巴托什斯基的刀锋只划破了你的衣服，但逼得你又后退几步。你本能地加重了下一击的力道，奋力朝对手够去。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}At the last moment, you dodge and Batoshski's knife only tears through your clothes, forcing you back even further. Instinctively, you pour more strength into your next attack, as you strain to reach your opponent.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你在最后一刻闪开，巴托什斯基的刀锋只划破了你的衣服，但逼得你又后退几步。你本能地加重了下一击的力道，奋力朝对手够去。{/n}
